title: hook-gitplugin plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the hook-gitplugin semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_FILES.description: Comma-, semicolon-, or newline-separated file paths to include in the release commit.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_COMMIT_MESSAGE.description: Optional commit message override for the release commit.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_BRANCH.description: Optional branch override. Falls back to SEMREL_BRANCH.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_TAG_NAME.description: Optional tag name override. Falls back to SEMREL_TAG_NAME / SEMREL_VERSION / SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_SIGN_TAG.description: When true, create a signed tag.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_SIGNED_OFF_BY.description: When true, add a Signed-off-by line to the release commit.

SEMREL_BRANCH.description: Release branch name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_TAG_NAME.description: Release tag name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_TAG_PREFIX.description: Tag prefix used by semrel core, for example "v".

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
